mapper.insert:
SELECT breed_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO breed(breedno, cat_no, memberno, breed_name, title, content, origin, kg, height, size_type, rdate) VALUES(#{breedno}, #{cat_no}, #{memberno}, #{breed_name}, #{title}, #{content}, #{origin}, #{kg}, #{height}, #{size_type}, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT breedno, cat_no, memberno, breed_name, title, content, recom, viewcnt, origin, kg, height, size_type, rdate FROM breed ORDER BY breedno DESC
SELECT breedno, cat_no, memberno, breed_name, title, content, recom, viewcnt, rdate, origin, kg, height, size_type FROM breed WHERE cat_no = #{cat_no} ORDER BY breedno DESC
SELECT breedno, cat_no, memberno, breed_name, title, content, recom, viewcnt, rdate, origin, kg, height, size_type FROM breed WHERE breedno = #{breedno}

SELECT breedno, cat_no, memberno, breed_name, title, content, recom, viewcnt, rdate, origin, kg, height, size_type FROM breed
WHERE cat_no=#{cat_no}
WHERE cat_no=#{cat_no} AND (UPPER(breed_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(content) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%')
ORDER BY breedno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE breed SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE breedno = #{breedno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM breed WHERE cat_no=#{cat_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM breed WHERE memberno=#{memberno}
